ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stellar_parameters" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "dc_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating a specific condition (e.g., 0 or 1) */,
  "kid" REAL /* KIC (Kepler Input Catalog) ID of the star */,
  "lph" REAL /* LPH value (a derived parameter) */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the star in solar masses */,
  "prot" REAL /* Rotation period of the star in days */,
  "prot_err" REAL /* Error in the rotation period */,
  "teff" REAL /* Effective temperature of the star in Kelvin */,
  "logg" REAL /* Surface gravity of the star in log10(cgs units) */,
  "w" REAL /* A weight factor used in calculations */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the star (e.g., G2V, K0V) */,
  "metallicity" REAL /* Metallicity of the star (Fe/H) */,
  "age" REAL /* Estimated age of the star in billions of years */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the star in parsecs */,
  "radial_velocity" REAL /* Radial velocity of the star in km/s */,
  "parallax" REAL /* Parallax of the star in milliarcseconds */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the star in solar luminosities */,
  "binary_status" INTEGER /* Whether the star is part of a binary system (e.g., 0 or 1) */,
  "exoplanet_status" INTEGER /* Whether the star has known exoplanets (e.g., 0 or 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star being observed */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observatory where the observation was made */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the observation */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "data_file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the observation */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., photometric, spectroscopic) */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time of the observation in seconds */,
  "filter_used" TEXT /* Filter used during the observation (e.g., V-band, R-band) */,
  "seeing" REAL /* Seeing conditions during the observation in arcseconds */,
  "airmass" REAL /* Airmass during the observation */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stellar_parameters ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observatory_id FOREIGN KEY ("observatory_id") REFERENCES observatories ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observatories" (
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observatory */,
  "observatory_name" TEXT /* Name of the observatory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observatory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the observatory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the observatory */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the observatory */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the observatory in meters */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the observatory */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the observatory was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the observatory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observatory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "observatory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observatory where the instrument is located */,
  "wavelength_range" TEXT /* Wavelength range of the instrument in nanometers */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Spectral resolution of the instrument */,
  "first_used_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was first used */,
  "last_used_date" TEXT /* Date the instrument was last used */,
  "calibration_status" INTEGER /* Calibration status of the instrument (e.g., 0 for calibrated, 1 for needs calibration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., photometric, spectroscopic) */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "data_file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the dataset */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FITS) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., telescope name, mission name) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the dataset (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for poor) */,
  "data_release_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, FITS) */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the file (e.g., gzip, zip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file for integrity verification */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., professor, student) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's research focus */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the research team */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the research team was established */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Website of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role_in_team" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., researcher, data analyst, student) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the team (if applicable) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the user to the team (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team managing the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_website" TEXT /* Website of the project */,
  "publication_count" INTEGER /* Number of publications resulting from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "project_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-dataset link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the project */,
  "dataset_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the dataset in the project */,
  "dataset_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the dataset in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_observations" (
  "project_observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-observation link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation used in the project */,
  "observation_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the observation in the project */,
  "observation_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the observation in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_observations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_observations_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_stars" (
  "project_star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-star link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star studied in the project */,
  "star_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the star in the project */,
  "star_importance" TEXT /* Importance of the star in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_stars_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stellar_parameters ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_stars_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., on a scale of 0 to 10) */,
  "quality_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used to assess quality (e.g., SNR, completeness) */,
  "quality_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality assessment */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the quality */,
  "assessment_method" TEXT /* Method used to assess the quality (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
